message:
fix(db): serialize concurrent message+recipient writes (br-5e8ew)

Serialize the file-backed create_message_with_recipients hot path, replace last_insert_rowid() with deterministic in-transaction lookup, and add focused durability regressions.

Verification:
- create_message_with_recipients_file_backed_survives_concurrent_writers passes
- same repro passes 100/100 direct reruns
- verify_message_recipients_visible_with_pooled_handle_sees_committed_rows passes
- message_visibility_probe_consistency_error_classifier_is_narrow passes
- rch exec -- cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-db --tests passes

Notes:
- cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings remains blocked by pre-existing warnings in mcp-agent-mail-core and mcp-agent-mail-db/atc_queries unrelated to this fix.
